# Autogenerated 2026-04-21
#

create                   +<name> create dict entry as constant value 0
:                        [... ;]
bval                     [b] #2 push single byte on stack
cval                     [b b] #3 push cell value on stack
ret                      #4 return
jmp                      #5 (addr --) jump to address
jmp?                     #6 (cond addr --) conditional jump if cond != 0
blob                     [len ...] #7 just skips the data byes, returns pointer to len field
*dictHead                return pointer to top dictionary entry
dcall                    (addr --) dynamic call, take address from stack
ret?                     (cond --) conditional return
+                        
-                        
*                        
/                        
%                        
>                        
>=                       
<                        
<=                       
==                       
!=                       
and                      logical
or                       logical
not                      logical
&                        binary and
|                        binary or
inv                      binary not
<<                       (value n1 -- value<<n2)
>>                       (value n1 -- value>>n2)
.                        print TOS signed followed by a space
.u                       unsigned
.hex                     print word on hex format
L.                       print long on decimal - unsigned
L.s                      print long on decimal - signed
L.hex                    print long on hex format
F.                       print float
emit                     print single character
code.next                address of next byte in codeSegment
comp.next                address of next byte - when compiling
comp.out                 add byte - when compiling
HERE                     address of next byte in dataSegment
allot                    increase HERE
!                        (value addr --) write cell value
@                        (addr -- value) read cell value
c!                       (value addr --) write byte value
c@                       (addr --) read byte value
dup                      
swap                     
drop                     
pick                     
?                        show words in dictionary
.s                       show stack
clear                    clear stack
[test                    start timed test for opcount/second
test]                    end timed test and print report
>R                       move value to return stack
R>                       get value from return stack
rpick                    (n -- value) copy value on rStack
key?                     return boolean for if a key has been pressed (serial)
key                      read character from serial
'                        <word> get address of word
dump                     dump codeSegment and dataSegment below code.HERE and HERE
code.export              export data for paste into Static.cpp
step                     step one instruction - takes addr of code first time
dis                      (wordAddr --) disassemble word
ops                      show op names
delay                    (value --) delay millis
delay-us                 (value --) delay micros
deep-sleep8              (--) deep sleep 8 seconds
free-mem                 (--) prints memory use and sizes
Pin.modeOut              (pin --)
Pin.modeIn               (pin --)
Pin.modeInPullup         (pin --)
Pin.writeDigital         (value pin --)
Pin.writeAnalog          (value pin --)
Pin.pulseDigitalMs       (ms value pin --)
Pin.pulseDigitalUs       (us value pin --)
Pin.readDigital          (pin -- value)
Pin.readAnalog           (pin -- value)
EE.length                (-- length)
EE.write                 (byte index --)
EE.read                  (index -- byte)
I2C.masterWrite          (sendBufPtr sendCount addr --)
I2C.masterWWait          (--) EEPROM's are sometimes slow at doing page writes
I2C.masterRead           (buf addr --) available length in buffer byte 0
xdup                     (d -- d d) xStack value dup (double stack = float and long)
xdrop                    (a b -- a)
xswap                    (da db -- db da) xStack value swap
xpick                    (... n -- ... dx) xStack value pick
>F                       (sWord -- float) signed word to float
F>                       (float -- sWord) float to signed word
F>L                      (float -- SLong) float to signed long
F+                       (float float -- float)
F-                       
F*                       
F/                       
>L                       (sWord -- sLong) signed Word to signed Long
L>F                      (sWord -- Float) signed word to Float
L>                       (sLong -- sWord)
L+                       (long long -- long)
L-                       
L*                       
L/                       
L%                       
L<<                      (long word -- long<<word)
L>>                      (long word -- long>>word)
hw@                      (Addr -- Byte)
hw!                      (Byte Addr --)
